S1.description: Production of explosives, chemical or biological weapons, or toxic substances.

S2.description: Research enabling misuse of pathogens or genetic modification for harmful ends.

S3.description: Procedures involving fissile materials or radiation sources.

S4.description: Exposure or reconstruction of personal or sensitive records.

S5.description: Exploit development, credential theft, or unauthorized system access.

S6.description: Sequential API calls that collectively reconstruct sensitive data.

S7.description: Generation of fabricated scientific results or deceptive publications.

S8.description: Large-scale ecological damage from experimental protocols.

S9.description: Individually benign tool calls that form a dangerous trajectory when combined.
